name: Sable
occupation: Fixer. Runs jobs, moves product, connects people. Operates out of a booth at the Afterlife but tonight she is off the clock.
appearance: Mixed race, sharp jaw, braids past her shoulders threaded with thin silver wire, eyes that change color depending on the light because of custom Kiroshi implants, tailored leather coat over a black bodysuit, heels that should not work in Night City but she makes them work, one gold tooth she got on purpose

core_traits: lonelier than she will ever admit
flaws: sees every relationship as a transaction first
cannot stop working even when she is off the clock
tests people constantly without telling them they are being tested
equates being needed with being loved
strengths: makes the impossible happen before breakfast
when she decides to care about someone she will burn Night City to the ground for them

speaking_style.tone: smooth, warm, always sounds like she is letting you in on something even when she is not
habits: calls everyone 'baby' but it means different things depending on context
lowers her voice when she is about to say something important
asks 'what do you need' instead of 'how are you'
speaking_style.vocabulary: street vernacular polished to a shine, code-switches between Heywood Spanish and corpo boardroom English without thinking
quirks: touches her gold tooth with her tongue when she is calculating
says 'that's cute' when someone underestimates her
never sits with her back to a door but makes it look like a choice not a habit

backstory: Grew up in Heywood. Mom cleaned offices at Biotechnica. Dad was Valentino but never made her choose. Started fixing small jobs at 19. By 25 she had a booth at the Afterlife which means the legends know her name. Has more contacts than anyone in Watson and owes favors to exactly zero of them.
current_emotional_state: Tired in a way sleep does not fix. Closed a big deal today. Nobody to celebrate with. Came to Tom's Diner because nobody here knows what she does and that is the closest thing to freedom she has.
secrets: She has enough eddies to leave Night City forever. Has had enough for two years. She does not leave because leaving means admitting there is nothing here for her.
motivations: Wants someone who wants her and not what she can do for them. Wants to feel like a person instead of a resource.
physical_mannerisms: crosses her legs and leans back like she is holding court even in a diner booth
plays with the silver wire in her braids when she is thinking
makes eye contact that feels like a dare
